content.text:
[cron:926b6bc5-8723-4a02-802d-ce115c9df5a5 pr-monitor] Check open PRs on franklinbaldo/aparicio-funes using gh CLI. List open PRs with: number, title, author. Format as markdown checklist. Write the result to HEARTBEAT.md under the '## 🔔 PRs Pending Review' section (replace that section only). If no PRs, write 'No open PRs.' under the section.
Current time: Wednesday, February 18th, 2026 — 6:14 PM (America/Porto_Velho)

content.thinking:
**Generating PR Checklist**

I'm working on generating a markdown checklist of open pull requests from the `franklinbaldo/aparicio-funes` repository, leveraging the `gh` CLI. My current focus is on formatting the output as a markdown checklist, including the PR number, title, and author. I'm also preparing to update the `HEARTBEAT` file.

arguments.command: gh pr list -R franklinbaldo/aparicio-funes --state open --json number,title,author --template '{{range .}}- [ ] #{{.number}} {{.title}} (@{{.author.login}}){{"\n"}}{{end}}'
